display_text: Energy Booster, Cost: 800: Secret shop item that grants a flat 250 bonus mana, increasing your total mana pool permanently. This is a pure utility component used to build larger items, providing significant mana scaling for heroes who need to cast more spells or sustain abilities with high costs. Stats: Bonus Mana: +250.
